posts.author: JohnAdams (John Adams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, folks,

I’m a GMail admin with a user who’s bought twenty-five monday.com licenses. His thought about how to set this up is to use a service account in GMail. We’re leery of doing this for a variety of reasons, but I’m having trouble giving him what he wants without creating a service account.

What do you do?

Thanks,

John A
